title: [research1]
description: user provides a topic, then this tool goes through highly credible sources to create a well sourced report User can select "informational" or "recipe" if it's a reciepe it's structured as how to do a particular thing. Ability to choose LLM for response. sources like ARXIV, pub med, wikipedia,crossref, semantic scholar, web of science, scopus, jstor,ssrn,dot gov government domains, biorxiv,medrxiv,openreview,papers with code,nber,fred,data.gov,nist,iso,acm digital library, ieee xplore, rand corpo
